emotional_tone: Rugged, heavy-duty, reliable, industrial, money-saving, no-nonsense.

rules.overline: uppercase text-xs sm:text-sm tracking-[0.2em] font-bold text-yellow-400

buttons.primary: bg-yellow-400 text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wide hover:bg-yellow-500 transition-colors px-8 py-4 rounded-none border-2 border-transparent hover:border-black shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(255,255,255,0.1)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wide hover:bg-zinc-800 transition-colors px-8 py-4 rounded-none border-2 border-zinc-600 hover:border-zinc-400

cards.base: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 p-8 sm:p-10 transition-colors hover:border-zinc-700

inputs.base: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 text-white p-4 rounded-none focus:border-yellow-400 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-yellow-400 transition-all outline-none
inputs.label: text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-zinc-400 mb-2 block

header.layout: Sticky top, absolute high z-index. Flex between. Logo on left, Primary CTA on right.
header.visuals: Backdrop blur lg, bg-black/80, 1px bottom border border-white/10.

hero.layout: Two column on desktop (Text left, Video right). 1 column on mobile (Text top, Video bottom).
hero.visuals: Background uses dark concrete texture (hero_bg). Overlay with bg-gradient-to-r from-black via-black/80 to-black/40 to ensure text legibility. Vimeo embed prominent.
hero.content: H1 heading, subheadline, dual CTAs (Watch Video [secondary], Order Now [primary]).

problem_vs_solution.visuals: Problem side: red tint (border-red-500/30, bg-red-950/20). Solution side: yellow tint (border-yellow-400/30, bg-yellow-900/10). Brutalist comparison.

the_difference_airflow.layout: Bento grid (Mode A: Tetris). 1 dominant card for the 2-chamber diagram, smaller cards for specific specs (airflow stats, motor protection).
the_difference_airflow.visuals: Use high contrast. Technical/blueprint aesthetic for the diagram area.

performance_dry_wet.layout: Alternating rows. Row 1: Drywall/silica (Image Left, Text Right). Row 2: Wet Performance (Text Left, Image Right).
performance_dry_wet.visuals: Massive typography. Gritty construction site dust images.

the_money_roi.layout: Full width banner section. Text centered.
the_money_roi.visuals: CRITICAL INVERSION: Background is solid brand primary (Yellow-400). Text is solid Black. This creates a shock in the dark theme and focuses entirely on the $12k/year savings. 'The Money' section.

proof_testimonials.layout: Masonry grid or simple flex column of chunky quotes.
proof_testimonials.visuals: Use massive quotation marks in yellow-400/20. Bold text.

faq.visuals: Customized Shadcn Accordion. Square corners, borders between items, hover states light up the text to yellow-400.

lead_form.layout: Two columns: Left side text/objections/close, Right side form.
lead_form.visuals: Form container uses solid zinc-900 background with harsh zinc-700 border. Form inputs are flat black (zinc-950).

hero_bg.description: Dark concrete texture for hero background.

dry_dust.description: Construction site dust for Dry Performance section.

video_embed.description: Main product video for hero section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install custom fonts from Google Fonts: Anton (400), Manrope (400, 700, 800), and JetBrains Mono.
Do NOT use any border-radius greater than rounded-sm. The UI must feel square, rugged, and brutalist. Remove default rounded-lg from Shadcn components.
Ensure all buttons have the custom hover effect defined in UI elements.
The 'The Money' ROI section MUST be a yellow background with black text to stand out.
Use Phosphor Icons or Lucide with sharp/straight edges (e.g., hard corners if using Phosphor).
All interactive elements must include 'data-testid' attributes per requirements.
Form must be implemented as a React component submitting to a FastAPI backend endpoint.
Apply overlay 'bg-black/60' (or darker/gradient) on the hero image to ensure Anton white text is 100% readable.
NEVER use placeholder text or generic fake logos. If you need a logo, build it with Typography (e.g., MUK BUDDY).
All components must be mobile-first. Contractors use their phones. Stacking order matters.
